calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-14-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Entire Action Pursuant To An Individual Settlement And Crc 3.770
Off Calendar Oct-30-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. ANDREA AMAYA, Esq. of JCL Law Firm, APC (Tel: 619-599-8292) for plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF ISABELLA BLACK's Motion To Dismiss Entire Action Pursuant To An Individual Settlement And CRC 3.770.

The Court inquires whether there is anyone present to oppose the dismissal, and determines that the dismissal is unopposed.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to dismiss entire action pursuant to an individual settlement and CRC 3.770" is granted

Plaintiff is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
